context_specifics.primary_curiosity: Should I grind to join the hardcore tech teams (like IITB Racing/Mars Rover) or start building a non-tech profile for a flashy Day 1 job?
context_specifics.exploratory_objective: Figuring out if core engineering is actually worth it, or if I should pivot early like everyone else.

psychology.primary_blocker: Extreme FOMO. I loved physics during JEE, but I am terrified of missing out on the high-paying finance/consulting track.

current_dilemma.urgency: Low - Just looking for perspective before Year 2 starts.
